name: contract-language-protocol
description: Monorepo for the Contract Language Protocol (CLP) — authority-first contracts for AI-governed execution

scripts.release:inspect:
echo '--- changeset status ---' && changeset status && echo '
--- version bump preview ---' && changeset version --dry-run && echo '
--- npm publish simulation ---' && changeset publish --dry-run --verbose && echo '
--- tarball contents ---' && pnpm -C packages/clp pack --pack-destination /tmp >/dev/null && tar -tf /tmp/yav-ai-clp-*.tgz | sort
